Description: Applying femtosecond laser capabilities to micro-satellite components, propulsion sensors, and fuel system parts requiring no-heat precision.
Justification: Diversifies revenue beyond the medical niche to reduce market dependency and leverages existing cold ablation moats against thermal fiber competitors.
Supporting References: Claude 4.5 Haiku, Gemini 3 Pro, GPT 5.2, Sonnet 4.6, GLM 4.7

Description: An AI-assisted CAD analysis tool and web portal allowing customers to upload files for instant manufacturability reports and automated quoting.
Justification: Reduces administrative friction, accelerates the sales cycle from days to minutes, and serves as a customer lock-in mechanism early in the design phase.
Supporting References: Claude 4.5 Haiku, Gemini 3 Pro, GPT 5.2, Sonnet 4.6

Description: A subscription-based model where customers pay a monthly retainer for reserved production slots and priority access to design engineering.
Justification: Builds a defensible recurring revenue base (target 30%+), stabilizes cash flow, and integrates Sublime into the customer's long-term R&D workflow.
Supporting References: Claude 4.5 Haiku, Gemini 3 Pro, Sonnet 4.6, GLM 4.7

Description: Precision machining for the semiconductor/probe card industry and micro-vias for flex PCBs that mechanical Swiss-turning cannot achieve.
Justification: Targets high-growth market adjacencies where miniaturization requires feature sizes below the limit of traditional machining.

Description: Pivoting to process advanced materials like bio-resorbable polymers and 'smart' alloys (nitinol formulations) that change shape based on temperature.
Justification: Creates higher-margin proprietary IP and positions the company at the frontier of implantable device innovation.

Description: A proprietary robotic loading system for lasers enabling 'lights-out' manufacturing of small-batch R&D parts 24/7.
Justification: Maintains the 'days, not weeks' promise while scaling volume, reducing labor costs, and improving consistency.

Description: A machine learning system that recommends optimal laser parameters for new material/geometry combinations to reduce setup time and scrap.
Justification: Protects margins by reducing setup scrap by 60–80% and builds a 'data moat' that grows with every part cut.

Description: An incubation program for MedTech startups providing subsidized manufacturing and regulatory guidance in exchange for equity stakes.
Justification: Generates proprietary deal-flow, long-term manufacturing exclusivity, and significant valuation upside through equity holdings.

Description: A regional equipment rental model leasing femtosecond units to universities and smaller manufacturers with on-site technician support.
Justification: Monetizes idle capacity or older units and creates an asset-light revenue stream through regional scaling.
